params.desc: REST client configuration key identifying the DocuWare connection from rest-clients.yaml

params.name: documentId
params.desc: The unique identifier of the document whose index fields will be updated

params.name: fileCabinetId
params.desc: The unique identifier of the file cabinet containing the document

params.desc: Index field values to update on the target DocuWare document

params.name: documentIndexFields
params.desc: Updated document index fields returned by DocuWare after the update operation

name: **Description
This API endpoint allows you to update the fields of a specific document in a file cabinet.
**Integration
uploadFileWithIndexFields(String,String,File,List<DocuWareProperty>,String)
- Updates index fields for a specific DocuWare document.
- Calls REST endpoint /FileCabinets/{FileCabinetId}/Documents/{DocumentId}/Fields via the update document RestClientCall in UpdateService.p.json.
- Prepares the request body by converting indexFields into propertiesJson with:
+ new DocuWarePropertiesUpdate(in.indexFields)
+ DocuWareService.get().serializeProperties(properties)
- Sends the resulting raw JSON as DocumentIndexFields in the PUT body.
- Returns the updated DocuWare DocumentIndexFields object.
Parameters:
- configKey (String): REST client configuration key to identify the DocuWare server connection from rest-clients.yaml
- fileCabinetId (String): The unique identifier of the file cabinet where the document resides
- documentId (String): The unique identifier of the document whose index fields will be updated
- indexFields (List<DocuWareProperty>): Index field values to update on the target DocuWare document
- Default / Return: Returns a DocuWare DocumentIndexFields object representing the updated document fields returned by the update operation.
**How to integrate
- Add Call: Add a Call element to your process that invokes the UpdateService sub-process using signature updateDocument(String, String, String, List<DocuWareProperty>).
- Prepare data: Populate the parameters before calling:
+ configKey: REST client configuration key matching the entry in config/rest-clients.yaml
documentId: ID of the document whose index fields will be updated
+ fileCabinetId: ID of the File Cabinet containing the document
+ indexFields: List<DocuWareProperty> with index metadata values to update on the document
- Build request body: UpdateService.p.json prepares the raw JSON payload in the script step:
+ new DocuWarePropertiesUpdate(in.indexFields)
+ DocuWareService.get().serializeProperties(properties)
+ This produces in.propertiesJson
+ The update document RestClientCall sends that raw JSON as DocumentIndexFields in the PUT request body
- Call REST API: The update document RestClientCall sends the update to:
+ PUT /FileCabinets/{FileCabinetId}/Documents/{DocumentId}/Fields
- Return object: The call returns a com.docuware.dev.schema._public.services.platform.DocumentIndexFields
+ map the process result to result.documentIndexFields
+ use the returned value to verify which fields were updated
- Post-success behavior: After success, the document’s index fields are updated in DocuWare
+ inspect documentIndexFields to confirm the updated metadata values
- Example (conceptual):
+ Set variables:
configKey = "02d1eec1-32e9-4316-afc3-793448486203"
fileCabinetId = "FC-123"
documentId = "DOC-456"
indexFields = [DocuWareProperty(...), ...]
+ Call the UpdateService sub-process with the matching signature
+ After the Call returns, read documentIndexFields for confirmation
- Notes & tips:
+ configKey must match the RestClients entry in rest-clients.yaml so URL and credentials are correct
+ indexFields must match the target file cabinet’s index schema
+ No file upload is needed for this operation; it only updates document metadata fields
+ Use the returned DocumentIndexFields to verify the update result

Summary: Add a Call to UpdateService with updateDocument(String, String, String, List<DocuWareProperty>), set configKey, documentId, fileCabinetId, and indexFields, let the process serialize the update payload, call PUT /FileCabinets/{FileCabinetId}/Documents/{DocumentId}/Fields, and verify the returned DocumentIndexFields.
**Prepare request body
Prepare data request body to call Docuware APIs
**update document
Call REST Client APIs from Docuware.
